mapper.select: SELECT id, custom_logo, custom_favicon, custom_css, primary_color, secondary_color, accent_color, custom_email_header, custom_email_footer, custom_email_subject_prefix, custom_login_page_html, hide_powered_by, custom_copyright_text, enable_custom_domain, custom_domain FROM customers WHERE id = #{customerId}
mapper.update: UPDATE customers SET custom_logo = #{customLogo}, custom_favicon = #{customFavicon}, custom_css = #{customCss}, primary_color = #{primaryColor}, secondary_color = #{secondaryColor}, accent_color = #{accentColor}, custom_email_header = #{customEmailHeader}, custom_email_footer = #{customEmailFooter}, custom_email_subject_prefix = #{customEmailSubjectPrefix}, custom_login_page_html = #{customLoginPageHtml}, hide_powered_by = #{hidePoweredBy}, custom_copyright_text = #{customCopyrightText}, enable_custom_domain = #{enableCustomDomain}, custom_domain = #{customDomain} WHERE id = #{customerId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM white_label_builds WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM white_label_builds WHERE id = #{id} AND customer_id = #{customerId}
SELECT * FROM white_label_builds WHERE package_name = #{packageName} AND customer_id = #{customerId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO white_label_builds (customer_id, build_name, app_name, package_name, version_code, version_name, icon_path, splash_screen_path, custom_strings, custom_colors, server_url, build_status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{customerId}, #{buildName}, #{appName}, #{packageName}, #{versionCode}, #{versionName}, #{iconPath}, #{splashScreenPath}, #{customStrings}, #{customColors}, #{serverUrl}, #{buildStatus}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE white_label_builds SET build_name = #{buildName}, app_name = #{appName}, version_code = #{versionCode}, version_name = #{versionName}, icon_path = #{iconPath}, splash_screen_path = #{splashScreenPath}, custom_strings = #{customStrings}, custom_colors = #{customColors}, server_url = #{serverUrl}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND customer_id = #{customerId}

UPDATE white_label_builds SET build_status = #{buildStatus}, build_log = #{buildLog}, download_url = #{downloadUrl}, built_at = CASE WHEN #{buildStatus} = 'completed' THEN NOW() ELSE built_at END, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND customer_id = #{customerId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM white_label_builds WHERE id = #{id} AND customer_id = #{customerId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM email_templates WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} OR customer_id = 0 ORDER BY template_type

SELECT * FROM email_templates WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} AND template_type = #{templateType} UNION ALL SELECT * FROM email_templates WHERE customer_id = 0 AND template_type = #{templateType} AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM email_templates WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} AND template_type = #{templateType}) LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO email_templates (customer_id, template_type, subject, body_html, body_text, is_custom, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{customerId}, #{templateType}, #{subject}, #{bodyHtml}, #{bodyText}, #{isCustom}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE email_templates SET subject = #{subject}, body_html = #{bodyHtml}, body_text = #{bodyText}, is_custom = #{isCustom}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND customer_id = #{customerId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM email_templates WHERE id = #{id} AND customer_id = #{customerId}
